programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee and Torres try to recover a stolen truck filled with toys for the Navy's annual Christmas drive; the truth about Parker's mother is finally revealed; Knight is tasked with tracking down a former member of the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins
programme.desc: As the team discovers Gibbs' drunken Vegas elopement with Diane, the newlyweds contemplate their future; the team investigates a fatal movie theater bombing with a connection to the Pruitt compound where Franks' brother Mason is staying.

programme.title: Live: LPGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: A champion is crowned at the LPGA Riviera Maya Open at Mayakoba. Chizzy Awai claimed the title and $375,000 by winning last year's event at Playa del Carmen, Mexico.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: A champion is crowned following the final round of the PGA Tour signature event in Miami. The field must survive the daunting par-4 18th hole at Trump National Doral to secure the prestigious title and claim a lucrative multimillion-dollar payout.

programme.desc: The increasing trend of "disaster tourists"; a dense jungle in the mountains of Colombia where rare species of birds flourish; where flowers for the world's most famous perfumes have been grown and gathered for more than 100 years.

programme.desc: After an online acquaintance spends thousands of dollars on a woman in a matter of days, she sues him for harassment; a motorist says a mysterious white car hit his head-on and caused him to back into six vehicles.

programme.sub-title: Hockey Violence Victim; Float My Houseboat!

programme.desc: When Colette tries to fix up her run-down car to get it re-registered, Gregg encourages her to buy a new one to save money; Barb tries to teach everyone DMV robbery protocols.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a big city donor is murdered inside her apartment, the team tracks down the young killer who leads them into a crypto scam he's been running with one of his victims, looking to seek revenge on his family.
